introSection: Velocity is a steel launched roller coaster located at Flamingo Land in Malton, North Yorkshire, England, UK. It is the second Vekoma Motorbike Coaster installation, and the only motorbike roller coaster from any company in the United Kingdom.

sections.title: History
sections.content:
Velocity opened on 2 July 2005.

For the 2020 season, Velocity was painted red with grey supports and the train was painted red and yellow. Previously, the ride had orange track and blue supports, and the train was blue and yellow.

sections.title: Design
sections.content: The ride features a long launch section into a figure-8 shaped helix, two bunny hills and the final brake section.

sections.title: Trains
sections.content: The train is designed to give the rider the feeling that they are riding a motorbike.

fullText:
Velocity is a steel launched roller coaster located at Flamingo Land in Malton, North Yorkshire, England, UK. It is the second Vekoma Motorbike Coaster installation, and the only motorbike roller coaster from any company in the United Kingdom.

Velocity opened on 2 July 2005.

For the 2020 season, Velocity was painted red with grey supports and the train was painted red and yellow. Previously, the ride had orange track and blue supports, and the train was blue and yellow.

The ride features a long launch section into a figure-8 shaped helix, two bunny hills and the final brake section.

The train is designed to give the rider the feeling that they are riding a motorbike.
